name: eazo-factory
description: Generate and review standardized Eazo apps with Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Generate a polished, reviewed Eazo app from one prompt.
interface.longDescription: Eazo Factory turns one product prompt into a standardized Eazo app using the official Eazo Next.js template, $imagegen design, deterministic checks, and mandatory independent review.
capabilities: Generate standardized Eazo apps from the official template
Create functional UI references with image generation
Audit every interactive control with an independent reviewer
defaultPrompt: Use @eazo-factory to create one standardized Eazo app.
